---
title: AI Tools
lightbox:
  match: auto
  effect: fade
  desc-position: right
  loop: false
#  css-class: "my-css-class"
---

# Writing support tools

![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/iras/iras_01_chatgpt.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/iras/iras_02_claude.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/iras/iras_03_gemini.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/iras/iras_04_jenni.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/iras/iras_05_paperpal.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/iras/iras_06_writefull.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/iras/iras_07_trinka.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/iras/iras_08_ajk.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/iras/iras_09_grammarly.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/iras/iras_10_deepl.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}

# Literature search tools

![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/irodalomkereses/irodalomkereses_01_elicit.png){.lightbox width=20%
group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/irodalomkereses/irodalomkereses_02_consensus.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/irodalomkereses/irodalomkereses_03_semantic_scholar.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/irodalomkereses/irodalomkereses_04_scite_ai.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/irodalomkereses/irodalomkereses_05_researchrabbit.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/irodalomkereses/irodalomkereses_06_connected_papers.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/irodalomkereses/irodalomkereses_07_litmaps.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/irodalomkereses/irodalomkereses_08_scispace.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/irodalomkereses/irodalomkereses_09_perplexity.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
![](tudastar/mi_eszkozok/irodalomkereses/irodalomkereses_10_notebooklm.png){.lightbox width=20% group="my-gallery"}
